$comment: Token Accessibility config for Robert DeLanghe's brand. Adapted from bounded-systems/brand's config of the same shape. Paths resolve relative to this file's dir (tokens/).

pairing.$comment: Coverage engine. Derives the REAL fg×bg pairings from actual stylesheet usage, UNIONs the hand-declared palette.pairings.json in, and scores every pair. Report-only (gate:false) — the hand-declared palette member is the fail-closed gate.

likeness.$comment: Hygiene (near-duplicate tokens) + distinctness (categorical status colours must stay separable under normal AND CVD simulation). The grade trio must not collapse.

$notScoped: opacity and targetSize sections are omitted — no composited-opacity color usage or interactive-target-size tokens have been audited for this pinning yet. Both are optional keys the runner skips cleanly when absent (see vendor/conformance-kit/gates/token-a11y.mjs); adding them is real follow-up work, not done here.
$knownFailing: palette.pairings.json currently has 11 real CVD/APCA/non-text failures (accent-on-paper under simulated deuteranopia; several decorative divider/border pairings well under the 3:1 UI floor). These need actual palette-value changes, not a rename, to fix — tracked as follow-up rather than silently omitted or faked passing.
